fields.title: AI Frontier
fields.venue: KIT Skill Hub, Financial District, Hyderabad

fields.name: Vaishnavi Devi
fields.bio: I am Vaishnavi, AI/ML Engineer and Data Analyst with a strong interest in Generative AI. Founder of Vyreka, a Hyderabad-based tech community empowering students with industry-ready skills through practical learning and collaboration.

fields.name: Guggilla SaiKiran
fields.bio: Graphics & Social Media Intern @Goavo.ai and Team Lead at Vyreka, combining creativity, leadership, and digital marketing to create impactful brand experiences.

fields.name: Pothala PradeepKiran
fields.bio: Passionate technology professional dedicated to continuous learning, problem-solving, and creating impactful solutions through architectural design, technology transformation, and team-wide collaboration.

fields.name: Mohammed Ismail
fields.bio: Backend Developer focused on building robust architectures, optimizing performance, and developing solutions that bridge innovation with execution.

fields.name: Rahul Paladugula
fields.bio: Focused on technical workspace integrity, deployment workflows, and ensuring students experience smooth configurations during hackathons and dynamic practical workshops.

fields.name: Ankam Vennela
fields.bio: Dedicated to troubleshooting technical challenges, managing infrastructure setups, and assisting standard developer operations across ecosystem platforms.

fields.name: Krishnaveni Reddy
fields.bio: Connecting Vyreka with corporate visionaries and tech industry veterans to organize masterclasses that enrich our student learning ecosystems.

fields.name: Afeefa Rahman
fields.bio: Curating a diverse roster of technical speakers by scouting emerging talent and validating industry relevance to align our tech seminars with future market trends.

fields.name: Rimsha Nishanth
fields.bio: Driving strategic institutional alliances and securing community resource sponsorships to elevate funding scale and keep event access fully dynamic for tech scale builders.

fields.name: Geethika Jaggumantri
fields.bio: Leading promotional outreach blueprints and public relations funnels across social channels to scale tech awareness and optimize organic community growth parameters.

fields.name: Sreeja Shetty
fields.bio: Managing on-ground event workflows, stage presence dynamics, and anchoring live meetups to maintain engaging, seamless community event timelines.

fields.name: Mora Shiva
fields.bio: Managing local public networks, student ecosystem relations, and community visibility channels to foster dynamic collaboration structures across Hyderabad's colleges.
